content:
I received my BA in Literature and my MFA in Creative Writing (with a heavy course load of Literature classes). I've been a reader and lover of narrative since I was a child, and continue to study and further expand my knowledge in all areas of Literature. My interests don't lead me to only contemporary writer's; my interests span the Classics all the way to yesterday's literary magazine's publications.



My mom lightly jests that as a kid I was an unstoppable question asking machine. This curiosity has followed me through my entire life and has led me down the path of academia. I've always been a student of the world and intend to continue to be a student and continue to learn and expand my knowledge base. My hunger for knowledge, and my close proximity to my last degree, makes me a valuable candidate because I remember what it means to be a student in a community college; I remember what I liked and disliked from my previous instructors, and I try to take that into the classroom, constantly incorporating new methods and technologies in order to continue improving the quality of my instruction.
context: From document: Student Success Statement — chunk 6 (chunk 6/11)
